caption: A man with light-colored hair, wearing a dark blue long-sleeved shirt, is seen from the chest up in a small video window on the left side of a video game interface. The background shows a football stadium with "FedEx" signage and a crowd. The screen displays a play-calling menu for a football game with various tabs such as "COACH SUGGESTIONS," "PLAYER," "FORMATION," "CONCEPT," and "FAVORITES." On the right side, a section titled "PREVIOUS PLAY" shows a play called "MIKE BLITZ" and text that reads "SAVE RANGE" and "Player is a blocker job holding own the ball." The game state is indicated at the top as "4th & 8" with "M" leading "Exo" 14 to 7, with "3rd" quarter, "3:25" remaining, and "28" seconds on the play clock. Across the frames, the scene remains static with no visible movement or changes in the on-screen information.
